stem: Which of the following is NOT one of the four characteristics of a professional described in this chapter?

options.A: Maximisation of personal commission on every sale
options.B: Evidence of mastery of subject matter
options.D: Spirit of loyalty to fellow financial adviser representatives

explanation: 教材 1.2–1.5 列出的四大特征为:掌握专业知识的证据、可靠性、管理自身利益、对同业的忠诚精神。'最大化个人佣金'恰是教材所批评的'纯自私的商业观',并非专业特征。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s1.2–1.5

stem: According to the chapter, the basic characteristic that gives a professional credibility is:

options.A: The size of the firm he represents
options.B: Having the technical knowledge and skills of the product or subject matter
options.C: The number of clients he serves

explanation: 教材 1.2 指出,具备产品或主题的技术知识与技能是专业人士的基本特征,赋予其可信度。其余选项与可信度的来源无关。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s1.2

stem: Where there is a conflict of interest between the client's interest and the professional's interest, the chapter states that the professional should:

options.A: Always place his own commercial interest first because he is accountable to his family
options.B: Withdraw immediately from all advisory work
options.C: Allow the client's interest to prevail within a reasonable scope
options.D: Split the benefit equally between himself and the client

explanation: 教材 1.4 明确,利益冲突时专业人士应让客户利益在合理范围内优先。教材也承认执业须商业可行(可纳入盈利因素),但不等于把自身利益绝对放在首位;A 因此错误。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s1.4

stem: Which statement best reflects the chapter's treatment of a professional doing 'free work' for a client?

options.A: A professional must always work for free when the client cannot pay
options.B: A professional must never decline any client under any circumstances
options.C: A professional must keep serving even if the client's demands are overwhelming
options.D: A professional is not expected to do free work and may ask to be discharged if the client's interest is too overwhelming

explanation: 教材 1.4 指出专业人士不被要求做免费工作;若客户利益过于压倒性,专业人士应请求被解除对该客户的服务。其余选项与教材相反。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s1.4

stem: In the Singapore context, where can the details of the mandatory examination that a financial adviser representative must pass be found?

options.A: MAS Notice FAA-N26 (Competency Requirements for Representatives of Financial Advisers)

explanation: 教材 2.4 明确,代表须通过强制考试,细节见 MAS Notice FAA-N26(代表胜任要求)。s27(1) 是一个主事人规则;s2(1) 是代表定义;FAIR 指引是公平交易准则,均非考试要求出处。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s2.4 / MAS Notice FAA-N26

stem: Which of the following is identified in the chapter as a basic requirement for an activity to be regarded as a profession?

options.A: A guaranteed minimum income for all members
options.B: Entrance barriers, such as passing prescribed examinations and meeting integrity requirements
options.D: A fixed retirement age for members

explanation: 教材 2.3 指出,一项专业需有入门门槛——通过规定考试以证明能力,并满足诚实、正直、财务健全等要求;个人不可自封专业。其余选项均非教材所列要求。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s2.3

stem: Which statute is identified in the chapter as the main statute that regulates the conduct of financial services activities in Singapore?
explanation: 教材 2.7 指出,《2001 年财务顾问法》(FAA 2001)是规管金融服务活动行为的主要成文法,由 MAS 主管。其余法规并非本章所指主要规管成文法。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s2.7

stem: Regarding professional societies or associations for financial adviser representatives in Singapore, the chapter states that:

options.A: Every representative must join a single statutory association
options.B: There are no associations at all in the industry
options.C: Membership of any association is prohibited by the FAA
options.D: There is no single association representing all representatives, but several credible associations represent different categories

explanation: 教材 2.8 指出,新加坡没有单一协会代表全体财务顾问代表,但有数个可信协会代表不同类别代表的声音。其余选项与教材描述不符。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s2.8

stem: A client is considering a complex, high-risk specified investment product such as an investment-linked life policy or an exchange-traded fund. According to the client expectations in the chapter, a professional should:

options.A: Conduct a client knowledge assessment or account review before making the recommendation
options.B: Recommend the product without any assessment because the client asked for it
options.C: Refuse to discuss the product at all
options.D: Collect the full payment in cash before giving any advice

explanation: 教材 3.7 指出,客户知识与风险承受度各异;就 ILP、ETF 等复杂高风险指定投资产品作推荐时,专业人士应进行客户知识评估(CKA)或客户账户审查。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s3.7

stem: Unless specifically authorised, how should a financial adviser representative handle a client's cheque payment, according to the chapter?

options.A: It should be made payable in the company's name and handed to the firm's cashier as soon as possible
options.B: It should be made payable to the representative personally
options.C: It should be deposited into the representative's own bank account
options.D: It should be held by the representative until the policy is issued

explanation: 教材 3.10 指出,除非另获授权,代表不应直接收款;若以支票支付,应抬头为公司名称并尽快交予公司出纳,以避免混同、不当处理或挪用款项的指控。其余做法均不当。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s3.10

stem: Why are financial adviser representatives under the FAA required by law to attend continuing professional development (CPD) courses?

options.A: Because clients pay extra for advisers with more CPD hours
options.B: Because the FAA prohibits any advice without annual re-examination
options.C: Because knowledge becomes outdated over time, and CPD keeps them abreast of products, rules, technology and skills
options.D: Because CPD replaces the need for a fact-find

explanation: 教材 3.12 指出,资历会随时间变得过时与不相关,故法律要求 FAA 下的代表参加 CPD,以紧跟产品知识、规则法规、技术与相关技能的发展,从而提供专业建议。其余选项无教材依据。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s3.12, s1.2

stem: Under Section 27(1) of the FAA, a representative is to act for only one principal, or for more than one principal only if the principals are related corporations. What are the stated objectives of this rule?

options.A: To increase the representative's commission and reduce his tax
options.B: To allow the representative to choose the most profitable principal each month
options.C: To limit the number of clients a representative may serve
options.D: To ensure the principal closely supervises the representative and to secure clarity on status and responsibility for complaints and redress

explanation: 教材 4.3 指出该规则目的为:(a) 确保主事人始终密切监督代表;(b) 厘清代表身份及投诉与赔偿的责任归属。其余选项均非教材所述目的。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s4.3 / FAA s27(1)

stem: Although the law places ultimate responsibility for the business conduct of a representative on the corporation (principal), the chapter lists the professional duties of the individual representative. Which is NOT one of those duties?

options.A: To obey the spirit and letter of the applicable law, rules, regulations and notices
options.B: To follow the code of ethics or advisory sales process of their society or association
options.C: To put the best interests of clients ahead of their own interests
options.D: To guarantee a positive investment return to every client

explanation: 教材 4.4 与 4.9 列出的专业职责为:(a) 遵守法律法规通知的精神与文字;(b) 遵循所属团体的道德守则或咨询销售流程;(c) 将客户最佳利益置于自身之前。'保证投资正回报'并非职责,也与教材其他章节无投资保证的事实相悖。
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.15 — s4.4, s4.9
